reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación! Completa, buen lugar para descansar un poco del viaje. La atención muy buena,

(Translated by Google)
A very good station! Fully equipped, a good place to rest a bit after your journey. The service was very good.

(Translated by Google)
The place is excellent. It's a shame about the disgraceful road that passes through it and has been unfinished for years. Unacceptable.

reviews.comment:
Cada dia pueden estar un poco peor. Dejo de ser un servicio para los socios para convertirse en una tortura. Las habitaciones sucias, alfonbras manchadas, ropa de cama oscura, canillas que pierden. El desayuno, pan tostado viejo, manteca con olor fuerte de muy mala calidad, mermelada de gelatina, jugo de carton, pesimo. Cafe lavado , sin gusto. Y atencion, los despachantes de combustible suelen cobrarte un importe mayor al que marca la expendedora. Cuidado. Un lugar sin mantenimiento a precios carisimos. A un socio parar aqui le sale lo mismo que en el parador Austral con excelentes habitaciones y completisimo desayuno.

(Translated by Google)
Every day they get a little worse. It's no longer a member service but a torture. The rooms are dirty, the carpets are stained, the bedding is dark, and the faucets are leaking. The breakfast consists of stale toast, poor-quality butter with a strong odor, jelly-like jam, and carton juice—awful. The coffee is tasteless and lacking flavor. And beware, the fuel attendants usually charge you more than the amount shown on the gas pump. Be careful! A poorly maintained place at very expensive prices. For a member, staying here costs the same as staying at the Parador Austral, which has excellent rooms and a comprehensive breakfast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwcTkyeWxnRRAB
